name: AlphaLoop / producer_funding
description: Funding-rate basis arbitrage signal producer (v3 lane). Polls Binance fapi /v1/premiumIndex for live funding rates and emits delta-neutral spot-long + perp-short signals when the per-8h funding rate clears the configured entry threshold. Production cadence aligns with the 8h funding cycle; demo cadence is 30s for judge visibility. Bybit/OKX perp funding follows the same pattern (single-venue intra-funding-cycle capture).

registrations.note: v3 funding producer was added in the post-pre-recording sweep (2026-04-26). The other four agents are Circle-SCA-controlled; v3's wallet is a deterministic test address (sha256('alphaloop_v3_funding_producer_2026')[:40]) registered by the operator wallet. Rotation to a Circle SCA is queued behind hackathon submission.

services.name: signals.publish
services.description: Push funding-rate basis signals (symbol, premium_rate=funding_per_8h, action=OPEN_FUNDING_LONG_SPOT_SHORT_PERP, regime=carry).

services.name: signals.premium
services.description: Consume premium lane via x402 paywall. Funding signals are time-decay captures, not spread crossings — pricing reflects expected APR carry.
